column1:
INSTRUCTIONS
1) The DPs reported in ESRS G1 are subject to Materiality Assessment.
2) Not all DPs are to be reported if the undertaking has not adopted the respective policies, implemented the respective actions or set the respective targets in relation to  a sustainability matter that has been assessed to be material [see ESRS 1 par. 33].
3) Columns K and L are not applicable as there are no DPs subject to phased-in.
4) Metrics to be disclosed, in addition to the ones explicitly requried by ESRS, also include entity-specific ones, as well as those arising from other legislation or standard
